63/aQS: Analytics that won't slow your site down
gHLYix: Google Analytics adds 73 KB to every page load. Eesee adds under 5 KB. That's a 15× difference — and your Core Web Vitals will thank you for it.
WdWULZ: Every kilobyte of JavaScript your browser has to download, parse, and execute adds latency. Analytics should never be the bottleneck.
d7xKlK: Script sizes are approximate and measured at time of writing. GA4 includes gtag.js + analytics.js payload.
5ht6Jz: A heavier analytics script doesn't just slow down your page — it directly affects the metrics Google uses to rank you.
LFCYX3: LCP, INP, and CLS are all affected by blocking JavaScript. A large analytics script loaded in <head> can add hundreds of milliseconds to your LCP.
We9gK+: Studies consistently show that a 1-second delay in page load increases bounce rate by 32%. Lighter analytics means faster pages means fewer people leaving immediately.
zSKGXO: Google uses Core Web Vitals as a ranking signal. A slow analytics script is working against your SEO while trying to measure it.
oUsWD6: GA4 is large because it's doing things analytics shouldn't need to do — advertising attribution, cross-device identity graphs, audience building for Google Ads. Eesee does exactly one job: measure your site traffic. That simplicity shows in the script size.
LMD0cb: No advertising SDK — we have no ad network to feed
m9Ent1: No cross-device identity graph — no need to track the same person everywhere
ilH73q: No A/B testing runtime — that belongs in a dedicated tool
pNGovs: No tag manager dependency — one script does everything
cRE8cc: Aggressively minified and compressed at the edge
RJPtHH: Loaded asynchronously — never blocks page render

9vzb8q: Analytics your visitors won't hate you for
UTOs70: No cookies. No consent banners. No tracking across sites. Eesee gives you accurate analytics while fully respecting the privacy of every visitor.
pca4n8: Google Analytics uses cookies to track visitors across sessions and devices. Under GDPR, PECR, and similar laws, this requires explicit consent before any tracking starts — meaning a cookie banner on every page. Visitors click 'reject', your data becomes incomplete, and your UX suffers.
Yg+DTc: Data you never see with GA
V0RjTS: Instead of setting persistent cookies, Eesee identifies unique visitors using a daily rotating hash of anonymised signals — IP address, user agent, and a random salt. No personal data is stored. No visitor can be identified. No cross-site tracking is possible.
w6Q63A: Eesee sets zero cookies on your visitors' browsers. There is nothing to consent to.
NW8ZkP: We never store IP addresses, names, emails, or any data that could identify an individual.
CR0my/: Eesee only tracks visitors on your site. We have no advertising network and no interest in following people around the web.
42w7D6: Your analytics data is yours. We don't sell it, share it, or use it to build profiles. You can export or delete it at any time.
rESuj9: All data is processed and stored in Europe. No transatlantic transfers, no Schrems II complications.
jVUnwW: Because no personal data is collected and no cookies are set, Eesee is exempt from cookie consent requirements in most jurisdictions.
7lqqMB: Eesee's cookieless approach means you can run accurate analytics without a cookie consent banner and without legal risk — in the EU, UK, US, and most other jurisdictions.

C9TMWf: Is Eesee Metrics GDPR and CCPA compliant?
Xns0tH: Yes, Eesee Metrics is fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, and other privacy regulations. We don't use cookies or collect any personal data that could identify your users. We salt user IDs daily to ensure users are not fingerprinted. You will not need to display a cookie consent banner to your users.
/lQrLy: Google Analytics is free because it's a data collection tool for Google's ad machine — your visitors' data funds their business. Eesee Metrics has one goal: give you clear, actionable insights without compromising your visitors' privacy.
RxKqXE: We also go further: automated weekly reports summarise what changed in plain English, and anomaly detection flags unusual traffic patterns automatically — so you spend less time in dashboards and more time acting on what matters.
wbblRb: Those are solid privacy-first, cookieless analytics tools and we share their values around GDPR compliance and no-cookie tracking. Where Eesee goes further is intelligence: automated weekly AI reports that summarise what changed and why, anomaly detection that flags unusual traffic patterns automatically, and an MCP server that connects your analytics to Claude, Cursor, and other AI tools.
uw/XET: Privacy-first is our baseline — AI-powered insights are the differentiator.
F41cZi: Those platforms are built for dedicated data teams with weeks to spend on configuration.
